[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A vertical smartphone screen shows a video page for an anime-like title with a character thumbnail at the top and playback and subscription controls near the bottom.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a large text title in white on a dark background that reads “Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi,” with smaller metadata and buttons below it. The upper portion shows a thumbnail image of an anime-style scene with a dark-haired person in a light outfit reaching a hand forward while other illustrated characters are partially visible behind them.

Setting:
This appears to be an indoor, screen-based view of a mobile app or video player interface, with the screen brightness and contrast making the content area dark and the text bright.

Visual Details:
At the very top, there is a status bar with time “9:35” on the left and signal and battery icons on the right. The thumbnail spans across the top portion and is tinted/dimmed by an overlay. Over the thumbnail, there is large red and white text that is partially obscured and not fully legible. A yellow calendar icon precedes a line that reads “Update Setiap Selasa” on a dark strip. The title is set in large, spaced lines in white. Beneath the title, there is a smaller Japanese line in white text. A rating row shows a star icon and the number “6.57,” followed by “Maho Film” and the date “Jul 06, 2026,” and a small “TV” tag. Another line shows “208.5K views.” Three pill-shaped category buttons appear labeled “Action,” “Fantasy,” and “Adventure.” Near the bottom, there is a large blue button with a play icon and the text “Lanjut Eps 1,” and to its right a gray button with a bell icon labeled “Subscribe.” A progress/time line shows “23:26 / 23:40” and a subscriber count “16.2K subscribers.” The bottom section shows the heading “Synopsis” in white text, with a partially visible empty area below. The camera angle is a straight-on view of the phone screen, with the layout aligned to the left and stacked vertically.

Practical Summary:
The image is a mobile app screen showing details for a video titled “Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi.” It displays a thumbnail at the top, rating and view information, category tags, and buttons to continue episode 1 or subscribe.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
